commit_scope: Route no-Accept /api/attention/kernel-runtime requests to the same BML native front door as ordinary JSON clients. The legacy production-manifest attention router now targets coherence-api-kernel-bml-front-door, so clients without an Accept header do not fall through to Python 404.

local_validation.notes: Public probes after 0e87ec90 showed 40/40 curl requests and the public kernel canary returning native BML attention, but Python urllib requests without an Accept header consistently returned fanout-python 404. Retargeting the lower-priority legacy attention router to the BML service should make both request shapes land on api_attention_kernel_runtime.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after the branch is pushed and the PR opens.

deploy_validation.environment: Hostinger production Traefik native front door
deploy_validation.notes: After deploy, verify GET /api/attention/kernel-runtime with no Accept header and with Accept: application/json both return X-Form-Handler api_attention_kernel_runtime.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR checks, deploy, and no-Accept public proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: bash scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh https://api.coherencycoin.com passed and observed api_attention_kernel_runtime for ordinary attention traffic.
A 40-request curl batch with normal Accept behavior returned 40/40 status 200 with X-Form-Router native-kernel and X-Form-Handler api_attention_kernel_runtime.
Python urllib and curl with an explicitly blank Accept header returned fanout-python 404 on the same path, proving the lower-priority legacy router still needed to point to the BML service.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: All public GET /api/attention/kernel-runtime request shapes should route to the BML native handler api_attention_kernel_runtime, including clients that send no Accept header.
test_flows: static Hostinger deploy path check requires both attention routers to target the BML front door.
post-deploy curl with Accept: application/json returns api_attention_kernel_runtime.
post-deploy Python urllib without Accept returns api_attention_kernel_runtime.
